title: Contact CAPIT | Data Corrections, Support, and Legal Notices
description: Reach CAPIT for support, data corrections, media inquiries, privacy requests, and legal notices.
headline: Contact CAPIT
body: Use this page for product questions, data correction requests, media inquiries, privacy requests, and legal notices.

sections.heading: How We Can Help
sections.body: We can help with website questions, public-data corrections, broken links, content feedback, media requests, privacy requests, and legal notices sent to the appropriate contact.

sections.heading: Contact Form
sections.body: Use the form below and choose the category that best matches your request.

sections.heading: Reason Options
sections.body: General Question, Data Correction, Media Inquiry, Privacy Request, Legal Notice, Technical Issue.

sections.heading: Consent Copy
sections.body: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy and acknowledge that CAPIT may use your information to respond to your request.

sections.heading: What We Cannot Help With
sections.body: CAPIT cannot recover wallets, reset exchange accounts, reverse blockchain transactions, reveal private keys, or provide trading, financial, legal, or tax advice. Do not include private keys, wallet passwords, or secret recovery phrases in your message.
